content.scenarioHint: 乘客在车站询问下一班车的发车时间以及是否通常准点
content.speakerText: I can help you with that.
content.responseTemplate: Could you tell me when the next bus leaves and whether it's usually on time?

blanks.answer: when the next bus leaves and whether it's usually on time
options: when the next bus leaves and whether it's usually on time
what time the bus arrives and if it's always late
where the bus goes and how long it takes
how much the ticket costs and if I can pay by card

content.hint: 询问班次时间时，常用 'when does... leave' 和 'is it usually on time' 结构
content.knowledgePoint: 询问交通时刻与准点率的礼貌提问句型

content.hint: 表达‘发车时间’时，常用 'the next departure' 或 'the train leaves' 结构
content.situation: 乘客在车站询问下一班火车的发车时间及是否准时
content.speakerText: Could you tell me when the next train leaves?
content.speakerTextCn: 您能告诉我下一班火车什么时候发车吗？
content.knowledgePoint: 询问和表达交通工具发车时间的常用表达
